presets.name: 4-Panel 2x2 Grid
presets.background: inked comic book page, clean white gutters between panels, consistent rendering style across panels

boxes.desc: panel 1 (top-left): establishing wide shot that sets the scene
panel 2 (top-right): medium shot introducing the main character
panel 3 (bottom-left): reaction close-up, strong emotion
panel 4 (bottom-right): action beat or cliffhanger

presets.name: 6-Panel 2x3 Grid
presets.background: classic six-panel comic page, even white gutters, dynamic camera variety between panels

boxes.desc: panel 1: establishing shot
panel 2: reaction close-up
panel 3: action beat
panel 4: dialogue exchange, two-shot
panel 5: detail / insert shot
panel 6: closing wide shot or turn-the-page hook

presets.name: Splash Page
presets.background: full-page comic splash, single dramatic illustration filling the page, cinematic composition

boxes.desc: full-page splash illustration, the money shot: a single epic moment with deep staging and bold silhouettes
story title / logo treatment in the top-left, integrated into the art
narration caption box across the bottom, yellow box with hand-lettered caption text

presets.name: 3-Tier Widescreen
presets.background: widescreen comic page, three full-width letterboxed tiers, cinematic decompressed storytelling

boxes.desc: tier 1 (full width): sweeping establishing panorama
tier 2 (full width): slow character beat, decompressed pacing
tier 3 (full width): payoff shot, strong horizontal motion

presets.name: Manga (Right-to-Left)
presets.background: black-and-white manga page, screentones, varied panel sizes, read right-to-left

boxes.desc: panel 1 (top, read first): wide establishing shot
panel 2 (middle-right, read second): close-up reaction (manga reads right-to-left)
panel 3 (middle-left, read third): cut to the other character
panel 4 (bottom, read last): dramatic full-width beat with speed lines
